mainEntity.name: Step-by-step: How to implement AEO for LA lawyers?
mainEntity.text: Step-by-step: How to implement AEO for LA lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. List 10 client questions. 2. Write 40-60 word answers. 3. Add FAQ schema. 4. Use LA keywords. 5. Publish and monitor.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: For LA: Research queries via Google PAA, format H3 answers, embed schema, optimize for mobile/voice. Track impressions in Search Console. Update quarterly for CA laws. This process secures AI snippets; poor execution leaves firms invisible.[1][4]

name: AEO Implementation Steps for LA Lawyers
description: 1. List 10 client questions. 2. Write 40-60 word answers. 3. Add FAQ schema. 4. Use LA keywords. 5. Publish and monitor.[4]
